caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses stands against a solid black background. She is wearing a light green tunic with intricate embroidery around the neckline and a dark beaded necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her garment. In the bottom left corner of the screen, a logo featuring a circular emblem and the text "NPTEL" is visible. Throughout the sequence, the woman is speaking and gesturing with her hands to emphasize her points. Her right hand moves from a closed position near her chest, sweeping outward and upward across her body. Her facial expressions shift as she talks, moving from a neutral expression to one of active explanation. The setting and her attire remain constant, while the only motion is her speaking and the rhythmic movement of her hand.
